name: 16p13_3_alpha_globin_HBA
description: 16p13.3 alpha-globin (HBA1/HBA2) gene cluster, ~140 kb subtelomeric region with paralogous HBA1 and HBA2 duplicons (>99.9% identity) and flanking Z, X, Y boxes of homology. NAHR between the Z boxes (~4 kb at >99% identity) produces the common -alpha3.7 deletion; NAHR between X boxes produces the -alpha4.2 deletion. Most prevalent monogenic disease worldwide (alpha-thalassemia).

architecture.internal_structure: Tandem duplication of HBA1/HBA2 with intergenic Z (3.7 kb), X (4.2 kb) and Y homology boxes; HS-40 alpha-MCS upstream regulatory element; LUC7L/POLR3K telomeric, MPG/HBQ1 centromeric. Common variants: -alpha3.7 (rightward), -alpha4.2 (leftward); -SEA, -MED, -FIL deletions remove both HBA copies.
